definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Siempre que / Con la condición de que]
definitions.usage_example: The bank will lend the money, provided that you have security.
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [ADAPTAR PRONUNCIACIÓN DE provided that AL PT]
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: The bank will lend the money, provided that you have security.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Una forma formal de decir 'si' o 'siempre y cuando'.]
definitions.usage_context_es: A formal way to say 'if' or 'as long as'.

definitions.usage_example: He was making progress, albeit slowly.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: He was making progress, albeit slowly.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Aunque; a pesar de que.]

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Por el contrario / A la inversa]
definitions.usage_example: Some people like it hot; conversely, others prefer it cold.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Some people like it hot; conversely, others prefer it cold.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Introducir una declaración o idea que invierte una que se acaba de hacer o a la que se hace referencia.]
definitions.usage_context_es: Introducing a statement or idea which reverses one that has just been made or referred to.

definitions.meaning: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Sin embargo / No obstante]
definitions.usage_example: It was raining; nevertheless, we went for a walk.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: It was raining; nevertheless, we went for a walk.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: A pesar de eso; sin embargo.]

definitions.usage_example: She is young, whereas I am old.
definitions.usage_example_es: [TRADUCIR AL PT: She is young, whereas I am old.]
definitions.usage_context_en: [TRADUCIR AL PT: Una forma formal de contrastar dos hechos.]
definitions.usage_context_es: A formal way to contrast two facts.
